text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for having me at A Festival☆of a
Hundred Idols! My name's Falco, and I'll be
representing Umadols!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Wow, you really did come to see me! Thanks
a lot!
choice_data_list:
I've been wondering how all your practice
would pay off.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that so? ☆ Look at you! You're practically
my biggest fan!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to show everyone how great Umadols
are now, so don't you take your eyes off me,
'kay? ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch from behind the crowd, waiting for
Smart Falcon to appear on stage...

text_block_list.name: Idol Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Looks like an "Umadol" is up next. Wait, what
even is an Umadol? That's not a regular idol,
right? You know anything about this?

text_block_list.name: Idol Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Nope. First time hearing it... I guess we'll just have
to wait and see.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Don't worry. She'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have faith in her unique charm—an Umadol's
charm.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hiii! I sing and dance and run at full speed! It's
your favorite Umadol, Smart Falcon! ☆

text_block_list.name: Idol Fans
text_block_list.text: Horsegirl...dol?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I see lots of confused faces, so lemme explain!
You see, Umadols are a new type of idol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umadols compete in races and sing at winning
concerts! Their sparkling splendor brings hope to
all!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna pour all my feelings into this next song,
so please listen carefully!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The backing track starts up... and there's an
immediate shift in the air.

text_block_list.name: Idol Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Wh-what's going on? It feels like she's
transmitting something directly to my brain...

text_block_list.name: Idol Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Are we at... a racecourse? This has to be a
winning concert!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone, can you hear me? Is my message
getting through? I love Umadols! I really do!)

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
(They run for the sake of standing on stage, and
do their best to shine as brightly as they can
there! And that's why I love them so much!)

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
(I want everyone here to love Umadols too! Take
in these feelings of mine and keep them in your
heart!)

text_block_list.name: Idol Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I can hear her feelings loud and clear. I
can tell how hard she's trying to shine!

text_block_list.name: Idol Fan B
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! You'd have to be a heartless monster not
to wave your lightsticks for her! WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Smart Falcon is able to get her
feelings across to everyone perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you all so much for listening to my song!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Were you able to learn a thing or two about
Umadols? I hope this is the start of something
wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umadols shine their brightest at the winning
concerts! Please come to a race to see for
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and make it a dirt race if you can! I run at my
cutest and most powerful in dirt races! ☆

text_block_list.name: Idol Fans
text_block_list.text: Whoa... You're saying the show gets better than this?! Now I have to see a race live and in person!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
She captures the hearts of all who see her. Sie ist
das Umadol.
